noRanking: Select a place on the map.
commentSent: Your review has been received and will be published after approval.
commentErr: Could not submit review, please try again.
minComment: Review must be at least 10 characters.
aboutHeroDesc: Don't just look at star counts — look at real satisfaction scores. Mekan analyzes reviews with AI to give you an honest picture.
aboutTechDesc: Mekan is built on modern, open-source technologies.
aboutCtaDesc: Create a free account and discover the best places around you.
feat1Desc: Every review goes through sentiment analysis and content moderation with Gemini AI. Fake or malicious reviews are flagged automatically.
feat2Desc: See what's around you on an interactive Leaflet map. Filter and sort as you like.
feat3Desc: Not just a star average — a composite score built from sentiment analysis, ratings, and positive review ratio.
feat4Desc: Save your favorite spots and stay up to date on any changes.
feat5Desc: Follow the fastest-rising places with the most reviews in the last 7 days.
feat6Desc: Approve reviews via the admin panel and get AI-suggested replies.
step1Desc: After finding a place on the map, the user enters a rating and comment. The form is rate-limited to prevent abuse.
step2Desc: The review is sent to Gemini Flash. Sentiment (positive/negative/neutral), satisfaction score, and inappropriate content detection are applied.
step3Desc: Clean reviews are published automatically. Suspicious content goes to the admin queue.
step4Desc: AI score + star average + positive review ratio produces a composite satisfaction percentage. Rankings and Place of the Month are determined by this value.
pomNoData: Not enough data for this month yet.
pomNoComments: No reviews yet for this place.
pomEmptyTitle: No Place of the Month Yet
pomEmptyDesc: Not enough data for this month yet. Check back soon!
placeEmptyDesc: Search for a place or click a place name on the left
placeNoReviews: No reviews found for this place.
